title: Positive Flow: Navigating through the news screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the news screen. | Verify the title 'SFF #24 - What Time is Testbed?' is displayed. | Verify the image with the text 'STORM FRONT' and 'FREAKS' is displayed. | Verify the subtitle provides details about the episode, including a guest and topics discussed. | Verify the headline 'Unusually Strong' April Storm Kicking Off Mostly Benign Weekend, Says Meteorologist Cliff Mass' is displayed.
expected_result: The title, image, subtitle, and headline are displayed as expected.

title: Negative Flow: No internet connection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the news screen. | Simulate no internet connection. | Verify the screen displays a message indicating no internet connection.
expected_result: The screen displays a message indicating no internet connection.

title: Boundary/Validation: Empty input fields
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the news screen. | Verify the title, image, subtitle, and headline are displayed as expected.
expected_result: The title, image, subtitle, and headline are displayed as expected.

title: Toggles state: Episode details toggle
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the news screen. | Verify the title, image, subtitle, and headline are displayed as expected. | Tap on the subtitle to toggle the episode details. | Verify the episode details are displayed.
expected_result: The episode details are displayed when the subtitle is tapped.
